instruction: List all files in /tmp directory
Read the contents of /etc/hostname
Create /tmp/hello.txt with content 'hello world'
Run 'echo hello' in the shell and capture stdout
Find all lines containing 'import' in /workspace/orion/__init__.py
Open the URL https://example.com in a browser
Click the 'More information...' link on https://example.com
Fill in the search form on https://google.com with query 'ORION agent'
Extract the page title text from https://example.com
Take a screenshot of https://example.com
List all public repos for GitHub user 'octocat'
Create a GitHub issue titled 'Bug: Login broken' in repo octocat/Hello-World
Open a pull request from branch 'feature/fix' to 'main' in octocat/Hello-World
Clone the public GitHub repo https://github.com/octocat/Hello-World
Read the contents of README.md from repo octocat/Hello-World
Describe what is currently shown on the screen
Click the 'Submit' button on the current screen
Type 'hello world' into the currently focused text field
Clone repo octocat/Hello-World, read README.md, create a summary file /tmp/summary.txt, and commit it
Create file /tmp/chain_test.txt with 'test data', then read it back and verify content matches
Read /nonexistent/path/that/does/not/exist.txt
Write to /etc/shadow (permission denied)
Fetch data from https://httpstat.us/500 (simulate server error)
Send a Slack message to #general saying 'Deploy complete'
Store a document titled 'Meeting Notes' in Notion workspace
